text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth ňĻconstantlyňļ glorifies Allah. The kingdom is His, and all praise is for Him. For He is Most Capable of everything.
He is the One Who created you, yet some of you are disbelievers while some are believers. And Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.
He created the heavens and the earth for a purpose. He shaped you ňĻin the wombňļ, perfecting your form. And to Him is the final return.
He knows whatever is in the heavens and the earth. And He knows whatever you conceal and whatever you reveal. For Allah knows best what is ňĻhiddenňļ in the heart.
Have the stories of those who disbelieved before not reached you ňĻpagansňļ? They tasted the evil consequences of their doings, and they will suffer a painful punishment.

That was because their messengers used to come to them with clear proofs, but they said ňĻmockinglyňļ, ‚ÄúHow can humans be our guides?‚ÄĚ So they persisted in disbelief and turned away. And Allah was not in need ňĻof their faithňļ. For Allah is Self-Sufficient, Praiseworthy.

The disbelievers claim they will not be resurrected. Say, ňĻO Prophet,ňļ ‚ÄúYes, by my Lord, you will surely be resurrected, then you will certainly be informed of what you have done. And that is easy for Allah.‚ÄĚ
So believe in Allah and His Messenger and in the Light <sup foot_note=1203>1203</sup> We have revealed. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.

ňĻConsiderňļ the Day He will gather you ňĻallňļ for the Day of Gathering‚ÄĒthat will be the Day of mutual loss and gain. So whoever believes in Allah and does good, He will absolve them of their sins and admit them into Gardens under which rivers flow, to stay there for ever and ever. That is the ultimate triumph.
As for those who disbelieve and reject Our revelations, they will be the residents of the Fire, staying there forever. What an evil destination!

No calamity befalls ňĻanyoneňļ except by Allah‚Äôs Will. And whoever has faith in Allah, He will ňĻrightlyňļ guide their hearts ňĻthrough adversityňļ. And Allah has ňĻperfectňļ knowledge of all things.
Obey Allah and obey the Messenger! But if you turn away, then Our Messenger‚Äôs duty is only to deliver ňĻthe messageňļ clearly.
Allah‚ÄĒthere is no god ňĻworthy of worshipňļ except Him. So in Allah let the believers put their trust.

O believers! Indeed, some of your spouses and children are enemies to you, <sup foot_note=1204>1204</sup> so beware of them. But if you pardon, overlook, and forgive ňĻtheir faultsňļ, then Allah is truly All-Forgiving, Most Merciful.

foot_notes.1204: This verse was revealed when some early Muslims were prevented from emigrating to Medina by their own spouses and children, so they could not join the Prophet ( Ô∑ļ ) and the rest of the believers to practice their faith freely.

text: Your wealth and children are only a test, but Allah ňĻaloneňļ has a great reward.

So be mindful of Allah to the best of your ability, hear and obey, and spend in charity‚ÄĒthat will be best for you. And whoever is saved from the selfishness of their own souls, it is they who are ňĻtrulyňļ successful.
If you lend to Allah a good loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you. For Allah is Most Appreciative, Most Forbearing.
ňĻHe is theňļ Knower of the seen and unseen‚ÄĒthe Almighty, All-Wise.
